SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_IGNITE.title: Ignite
SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_IGNITE.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 2 times. Initiative: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.

SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_SUPERNOVA.title: Supernova
SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_SUPERNOVA.descr: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies 2 times. Decisive: Apply -{Electric:diff()} Electric Potential.

SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_MONOTONE_FORM.s: If the costs of cards played this turn remain strictly increasing or strictly decreasing, whenever you play a card, multiply your Energy by that card's cost.

SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_COUPLING.title: Coupling
SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_COUPLING.descri: If X is prime, deal {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} damage {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} times to random enemies. Otherwise, gain {IfUpgraded:show:2X|X} Block.
SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_COUPLING.smartD: If X is prime, deal {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} damage {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} times to random enemies. Otherwise, gain {IfUpgraded:show:2X|X} Block.

SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_ARC_LIGHT.smart: Whenever your energy becomes a multiple of 2, gain {Block:diff()} Block.

SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_EVOLUTION.smart: Whenever you draw a Status card, draw 1 additional card.

SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_COLLAPSE.smartD: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Hits:diff()} times. For each card played this turn, this card's cost is reduced by 1.

SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_FRENZY.smartDes: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. ALL cards in your hand cost 1 more this turn.
